violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (market ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service, work order placed. PIC instructed staff to dispose ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The door to the outside, located at the main entrance, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC placed work order during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
A blender was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC removed. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024
The handwashing sinks in the restrooms are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (market ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine taken out of service, PIC placed maintenance request during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

Steak was observed held at 46 degrees Fahrenheit in the prep unit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff removed steak and chose to dispose of it. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The doors to the outside, located in the cafe area and the front entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024

The drain plug for the outside dumpster is missing. Drains in receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must have drain plugs in place. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
